entity.label: Shema
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One who stood by Ezra when he read the law (Neh. 8:4).

nodes.label: Shema
nodes.description: One who stood by Ezra when he read the law (Neh. 8:4).

verses.text: And Ezra the scribe stood upon a pulpit of wood, which they had made for the purpose; and beside him stood Mattithiah, and Shema, and Anaiah, and Urijah, and Hilkiah, and Maaseiah, on his right hand; and on his left hand, Pedaiah, and Mishael, and Malchiah, and Hashum, and Hashbadana, Zechariah, and Meshullam.
